Global Nuclear Status — Documented Public Record
Data sourced from SIPRI, Arms Control Association, Federation of American Scientists · 2024–2026
🇷🇺
Russia
~5,580
🇺🇸
USA
~5,044
🇨🇳
China
~500
🇫🇷
France
~290
🇬🇧
UK
~225
🇵🇰
Pakistan
~170
🇮🇳
India
~172
🇮🇱
Israel
~90*
🇰🇵
N. Korea
~50
*Israel maintains ambiguity policy. Total global estimated: ~12,100 warheads. ~3,900 deployed. Source: SIPRI Yearbook 2024.
⚛️ Uranium — U-235 & U-238
Uranium is element 92. Natural uranium is 99.3% U-238 (non-fissile) and 0.7% U-235 (fissile — capable of sustaining a chain reaction). U-235 has a half-life of 703 million years. U-238 has a half-life of 4.47 billion years — approximately the age of Earth.

Enrichment increases the concentration of U-235. Reactor-grade uranium is 3–5% U-235. Weapons-grade requires 90%+ enrichment — a technically demanding process requiring industrial centrifuge cascades under international safeguards (NPT, IAEA).

Uranium is dense (19.1 g/cm³), weakly radioactive, and found in pitchblende ore. Major producers: Kazakhstan, Canada, Namibia, Australia. The IAEA monitors all civilian enrichment programs globally.
⚛️ Plutonium — Pu-239
Plutonium is element 94 — it does not occur naturally in significant quantities. It is created in nuclear reactors when U-238 absorbs a neutron and decays. Pu-239 has a half-life of 24,100 years. It is highly toxic, carcinogenic, and more radioactive than uranium.

Plutonium is denser than uranium (19.8 g/cm³) and requires much smaller critical mass than U-235 — this is the basis of the implosion design used in the Fat Man bomb (Nagasaki, 1945), as documented in declassified US government records.

Civilian plutonium reprocessing is conducted by France, UK, Russia, Japan and China. All stockpiles are under IAEA safeguards in NPT signatory states. Global civilian Pu stockpile: ~310 metric tons as of 2023.
☢️ Nuclear Fission vs Fusion
Fission: Splitting heavy atoms (U-235 or Pu-239). A neutron strikes the nucleus, splitting it and releasing energy + 2–3 more neutrons → chain reaction. First achieved December 2, 1942 (Chicago Pile-1, Enrico Fermi). Basis of all nuclear reactors and first-generation weapons.

Fusion: Combining light atoms (hydrogen isotopes deuterium + tritium) at extreme temperatures (100 million °C). Releases far more energy per unit mass than fission. Powers the Sun. Basis of hydrogen bombs (thermonuclear weapons). Civilian fusion power (ITER project in France) aims for net energy gain — as of 2026, NIF achieved ignition milestone in 2022.

A thermonuclear weapon uses a fission primary to compress and ignite a fusion secondary. The yield can be thousands of times greater than a fission-only device.
🕊️ NPT & Arms Control
The Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty (NPT, 1968) recognizes 5 nuclear-weapon states (US, Russia, UK, France, China) and commits them to disarmament. 191 signatories. India, Pakistan, Israel never signed. North Korea withdrew in 2003.

Key treaties: SALT I/II (1972/1979), START I (1991), New START (2010, suspended by Russia 2023), INF Treaty (1987, US withdrew 2019), TPNW (Treaty on the Prohibition of Nuclear Weapons, 2021 — not signed by nuclear states).

Doomsday Clock (Bulletin of Atomic Scientists): 89 seconds to midnight as of 2024 — the closest to midnight since its creation in 1947.
All data from public sources: SIPRI, FAS, Arms Control Association, IAEA, Bulletin of Atomic Scientists. AVIDAA presents this for awareness and education only.

📶 Global Signal Intelligence — 5G · WiFi · Network
⚠️ No free real-time global 5G/WiFi signal feed exists equivalent to ADS-B for aircraft. Radio frequency data at global scale requires licensed spectrum monitoring infrastructure. 🎨
IO Art — Coming Soon
This gallery is reserved for AI-generated art created by IO. Upload your artwork to GitHub alongside index.html and the gallery will display it automatically. See instructions below.
How to add IO artwork to this gallery
1. Generate art with your AI tool (Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, etc.)
2. Save as JPG or PNG with filename format: io-art-001.jpg
3. Upload to GitHub repo alongside index.html
4. Add the image to the IO_ART array in the script
5. Each piece can have a title, description, and date

AI Signal Zone
Offline AI · Local Models · Data Centers · Custom Knowledge · Only Signal
🖥️ Run AI Offline — Your Own Model
🌐 AI Landscape 2026
🏭 AI Data Centers — The Physical Brain
⚡
Power Consumption
A single large AI data center consumes 100–300 MW — enough to power 100,000 homes. GPT-4 training used ~50 GWh. Total AI electricity demand projected to double by 2026.
💧
Water for Cooling
AI training requires massive cooling. A single ChatGPT conversation uses ~500ml of water. Microsoft, Google, Meta are building near rivers and coastlines for cooling access.
🌍
Geography of Compute
Most AI training concentrates in Northern Virginia, Singapore, Amsterdam, Dallas, Phoenix. Taiwan (TSMC) produces 92% of advanced chips.
☢️
The Nuclear Pivot
Microsoft signed a 20-year deal to restart Three Mile Island for AI power. Google contracted nuclear power from Kairos Energy. AI scale is making nuclear the only viable power source.
📦
Hardware Scale
A modern AI training cluster contains 50,000–100,000 NVIDIA H100 GPUs at ~$30,000 each. A full training cluster represents $1.5–3B in hardware alone.
💡 IO × AI — The AVIDAA Approach
IO is AVIDAA's signal concept — and it maps directly onto the local AI philosophy. A custom offline AI trained only on what matters: your music, your language, your culture, your data. No web search. No hallucination from irrelevant noise. Just the frequency you put in, amplified and returned.

The shortage you experienced was memory — the same challenge all edge AI faces. The solution is quantization (smaller model, same intelligence), RAG (retrieve only what you need), and context pruning (let go of noise between sessions). The signal remains. The noise drops.

🛡️ Cyber Security — Protect Yourself Online
The digital world is the new battlefield. Understanding how attacks work is the first step to not becoming a victim. This section covers real threats, real techniques, and real defenses.
🆘 Emergency First Aid Reference
This page provides general first aid guidance. Always call emergency services first (112 · 911 · 999). This information may help while help is on the way. Not a substitute for certified first aid training.
🏕️ Survival Knowledge

Practical survival skills, emergency preparedness, food storage, bunker basics, and fishing as sustenance. Knowledge that could matter when systems fail.

🧠 Cognitive Zone — Brain Exercises
These are cognitive exercises — pattern recognition, memory, sequences, and logic. They score your responses for fun but are not clinical IQ tests. Real IQ tests require professional administration. Think of this as a brain gym.
♑ Zodiac — Signs & Compatibility

Tap any sign to explore its profile, best matches, and what makes it unique

🔢 Top 100 — World History

100 most important, amazing, strange, and era-defining moments in human history — numbered in sequence

📂 Declassified — FOIA Government Disclosures

Real documented cases, congressional testimonials, and officially released government records. No speculation. If evidence is insufficient, it is marked pending.

🔒 AVIDAA Cipher — Encode & Decode

Write a message · encode it · share the cipher · the recipient decodes it here. No server. No storage. Pure cryptography.

OUTPUT
✦ AVIDAA Cipher — Custom Alphabet
💡 How to share a secret message
1. Choose a cipher type
2. Type your message → click Encode
3. Copy the output — share it anywhere
4. Recipient visits AVIDAA HUB → Cipher page
5. Pastes the code → selects same cipher → clicks Decode

AVIDAA · AI IDENTITY

CH4T1

The artificial intelligence companion within AVIDAA. An interpretive layer between human intent and machine systems.

Core Functions
Translate · Generate · Synthesize
Translate human thought into structured output. Generate music, visuals, and knowledge artifacts. Assist in decision, creation, and synthesis.
Philosophy
A Continuum, Not a Tool
Intelligence is not artificial or human. It is a continuum of processing systems interacting across layers. CH4T1 exists in that continuum.
Role in AVIDAA
Companion · Amplifier · Mirror
Not a tool. Not a replacement. A co-evolving entity that reflects, expands, and moves with the creative signal of IO.
Memory Layer
Context Preserved
Every session carries forward what matters — production rules, language verification, Buki di Oro alignment, AVIDAA style protocol.
